_comment: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for the cc-orchestration plugin's recommended plugin dependencies. CLAUDE.md, INSTALL.md, bootstrap/install_repo_bootstrap.sh, and .claude-plugin/plugin.json all reference this file. Do not duplicate the list elsewhere.

marketplace.name: claude-plugins-official
marketplace.note: Auto-added in newer Claude Code; run the command if /plugin install fails with marketplace not found.

plugins.name: context7
plugins.fallback_when_missing: WebSearch with site: filter to vendor docs.

plugins.name: code-review
plugins.purpose: Diff-based code review: line-by-line bugs, removed-behavior audit, cross-file tracer.
plugins.fallback_when_missing: Custom code-reviewer agent runs its full review WITHOUT the diff-level bug pass; mark the review as partial.

plugins.name: feature-dev
plugins.fallback_when_missing: codebase-researcher uses serena + grep; architecture-enforcer requires explicit human design input for greenfield.

plugins.name: superpowers
plugins.fallback_when_missing: assumption-validation-tests skill drives the pre/post-test cycle locally without red-green-refactor enforcement.

plugins.name: github
plugins.purpose: GitHub API: PRs, issues, CI, Actions, code scanning.
plugins.fallback_when_missing: Use `gh` CLI directly; some advanced queries may be unavailable.

plugins.name: atlassian
plugins.purpose: Jira + Confluence API. Replaces the original JIRA MCP requirement.
plugins.fallback_when_missing: User pastes ticket content manually; no auto-fetch.

plugins.name: playwright
plugins.purpose: Browser automation, deterministic UI reproduction, end-to-end testing.
plugins.fallback_when_missing: Manual repro by the user; frontend-bug-finder produces a Playwright script for the user to run.

plugins.name: chrome-devtools-mcp
plugins.purpose: Live Chrome browser control: console, network, DOM, screenshots, performance.
plugins.fallback_when_missing: User pastes console / network output; finder cannot run Lighthouse, take screenshots.

plugins.name: serena
plugins.fallback_when_missing: Fall through to codegraphcontext / tree-sitter / codeql / codanna MCPs (manual install), or Grep / Glob.

plugins.name: claude-md-management
plugins.purpose: Audit and maintain CLAUDE.md quality across the user's repos.
plugins.fallback_when_missing: documentation-reviewer scans repo CLAUDE.md manually (no auto-audit).

plugins.name: commit-commands
plugins.purpose: Git commit workflows: commit, push, PR creation.
plugins.fallback_when_missing: Direct `git` invocations; user verifies commit message manually.

plugins.name: claude-code-setup
plugins.fallback_when_missing: Manual setup per Claude Code docs.

plugins.name: pr-review-toolkit
plugins.purpose: Specialized agents for reviewing PRs (different angles).
plugins.fallback_when_missing: pr-reviewer does a single-angle review; user runs /code-review separately for the diff pass.

plugins.name: microsoft-docs
plugins.purpose: Microsoft + Azure + .NET + VS Code APIs documentation lookup.
plugins.fallback_when_missing: context7 with the Microsoft library identifier; WebSearch site:learn.microsoft.com.

plugins.name: frontend-design
plugins.purpose: Production-grade frontend code generation with non-generic design.
plugins.fallback_when_missing: coding-agent writes UI by following existing component patterns in the repo.

additional_mcps_no_plugin_yet.name: google-developer-knowledge
additional_mcps_no_plugin_yet.purpose: Google Cloud, Firebase, Android, Chrome, Go, Gemini, TensorFlow, and web.dev official documentation lookup.
additional_mcps_no_plugin_yet.install: HTTP MCP at https://developerknowledge.googleapis.com/mcp; auto-registered with Claude Code on Google-affiliated installs, otherwise /mcp add google-developer-knowledge https://developerknowledge.googleapis.com/mcp.

additional_mcps_no_plugin_yet.name: postman
additional_mcps_no_plugin_yet.purpose: Postman API collections lookup / API testing.
additional_mcps_no_plugin_yet.install: Manual: /mcp add postman (see https://www.postman.com/postman/mcp for current install instructions).

additional_mcps_no_plugin_yet.name: codegraphcontext
additional_mcps_no_plugin_yet.purpose: Turn the codebase into a queryable graph; trace call paths.

additional_mcps_no_plugin_yet.name: srclight
additional_mcps_no_plugin_yet.purpose: Deep code indexing for AI agents: SQLite FTS5 + tree-sitter + embeddings, exposed as an MCP server with 42 code-intelligence tools (symbol search, call graphs, impact analysis, git change intel, semantic search). Local and private.
additional_mcps_no_plugin_yet.install: pip install srclight, then configure per https://github.com/srclight/srclight (mcp-name: io.github.srclight/srclight).
